# Compile URL Dependencies

Tests for compiling dependencies specified via URLs.

## Wheel URL

### Compile wheel URL dependency

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_wheel_url_dependency -->

Compile a dependency specified as a wheel URL.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
flask @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/36/42/015c23096649b908c809c69388a805a571a3bea44362fe87e33fc3afa01f/flask-3.0.0-py3-none-any.whl
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in
blinker==1.7.0
    # via flask
click==8.1.7
    # via flask
flask @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/36/42/015c23096649b908c809c69388a805a571a3bea44362fe87e33fc3afa01f/flask-3.0.0-py3-none-any.whl
    # via -r requirements.in
itsdangerous==2.1.2
    # via flask
jinja2==3.1.3
    # via flask
markupsafe==2.1.5
    # via
    #   jinja2
    #   werkzeug
werkzeug==3.0.1
    # via flask

----- stderr -----
Resolved 7 packages in [TIME]
```

## Sdist URL

### Compile sdist URL dependency

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_sdist_url_dependency -->

Compile a dependency specified as a source distribution URL.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
flask @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/d8/09/c1a7354d3925a3c6c8cfdebf4245bae67d633ffda1ba415add06ffc839c5/flask-3.0.0.tar.gz
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in
blinker==1.7.0
    # via flask
click==8.1.7
    # via flask
flask @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/d8/09/c1a7354d3925a3c6c8cfdebf4245bae67d633ffda1ba415add06ffc839c5/flask-3.0.0.tar.gz
    # via -r requirements.in
itsdangerous==2.1.2
    # via flask
jinja2==3.1.3
    # via flask
markupsafe==2.1.5
    # via
    #   jinja2
    #   werkzeug
werkzeug==3.0.1
    # via flask

----- stderr -----
Resolved 7 packages in [TIME]
```

## Conflicting URLs

### Conflicting version and URL dependency

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::conflicting_direct_url_dependency -->

Requesting a version that conflicts with a direct URL fails.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
werkzeug==3.0.0
werkzeug @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/ff/1d/960bb4017c68674a1cb099534840f18d3def3ce44aed12b5ed8b78e0153e/Werkzeug-2.0.0-py3-none-any.whl
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in
success: false
exit_code: 1
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
  × No solution found when resolving dependencies:
  ╰─▶ Because there is no version of werkzeug==3.0.0 and you require werkzeug==3.0.0, we can conclude that your requirements are unsatisfiable.
```

### Compatible version and URL dependency

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compatible_direct_url_dependency -->

Requesting a version that matches a direct URL succeeds.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
werkzeug==2.0.0
werkzeug @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/ff/1d/960bb4017c68674a1cb099534840f18d3def3ce44aed12b5ed8b78e0153e/Werkzeug-2.0.0-py3-none-any.whl
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in
werkzeug @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/ff/1d/960bb4017c68674a1cb099534840f18d3def3ce44aed12b5ed8b78e0153e/Werkzeug-2.0.0-py3-none-any.whl
    # via -r requirements.in

----- stderr -----
Resolved 1 package in [TIME]
```

### Mixed registry and URL dependencies

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::mixed_url_dependency -->

A registry dependency and URL dependency for a transitive dependency can be mixed.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
flask==3.0.0
werkzeug @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/c3/fc/254c3e9b5feb89ff5b9076a23218dafbc99c96ac5941e900b71206e6313b/werkzeug-3.0.1-py3-none-any.whl
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in
blinker==1.7.0
    # via flask
click==8.1.7
    # via flask
flask==3.0.0
    # via -r requirements.in
itsdangerous==2.1.2
    # via flask
jinja2==3.1.3
    # via flask
markupsafe==2.1.5
    # via
    #   jinja2
    #   werkzeug
werkzeug @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/c3/fc/254c3e9b5feb89ff5b9076a23218dafbc99c96ac5941e900b71206e6313b/werkzeug-3.0.1-py3-none-any.whl
    # via
    #   -r requirements.in
    #   flask

----- stderr -----
Resolved 7 packages in [TIME]
```

### Conflicting repeated URL dependencies (version mismatch)

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::conflicting_repeated_url_dependency_version_mismatch -->

Requesting a package via two different URLs with different versions fails.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
werkzeug @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/bd/24/11c3ea5a7e866bf2d97f0501d0b4b1c9bbeade102bb4b588f0d2919a5212/Werkzeug-2.0.1-py3-none-any.whl
werkzeug @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/ff/1d/960bb4017c68674a1cb099534840f18d3def3ce44aed12b5ed8b78e0153e/Werkzeug-2.0.0-py3-none-any.whl
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in
success: false
exit_code: 2
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
error: Requirements contain conflicting URLs for package `werkzeug`:
- https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/bd/24/11c3ea5a7e866bf2d97f0501d0b4b1c9bbeade102bb4b588f0d2919a5212/Werkzeug-2.0.1-py3-none-any.whl
- https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/ff/1d/960bb4017c68674a1cb099534840f18d3def3ce44aed12b5ed8b78e0153e/Werkzeug-2.0.0-py3-none-any.whl
```

### Conflicting repeated URL dependencies with markers

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::conflicting_repeated_url_dependency_markers -->

URLs with disjoint markers don't conflict.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
werkzeug @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/bd/24/11c3ea5a7e866bf2d97f0501d0b4b1c9bbeade102bb4b588f0d2919a5212/Werkzeug-2.0.1-py3-none-any.whl ; python_version >= '3.10'
werkzeug @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/ff/1d/960bb4017c68674a1cb099534840f18d3def3ce44aed12b5ed8b78e0153e/Werkzeug-2.0.0-py3-none-any.whl ; python_version < '3.10'
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in
werkzeug @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/bd/24/11c3ea5a7e866bf2d97f0501d0b4b1c9bbeade102bb4b588f0d2919a5212/Werkzeug-2.0.1-py3-none-any.whl
    # via -r requirements.in

----- stderr -----
Resolved 1 package in [TIME]
```

### Conflicting repeated URL dependencies (git and PyPI)

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::conflicting_repeated_url_dependency_version_match -->

Requesting a package via git URL and PyPI URL for the same version fails because the URLs don't
match.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
werkzeug @ git+https://github.com/pallets/werkzeug.git@2.0.0
werkzeug @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/ff/1d/960bb4017c68674a1cb099534840f18d3def3ce44aed12b5ed8b78e0153e/Werkzeug-2.0.0-py3-none-any.whl
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in
success: false
exit_code: 2
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
error: Requirements contain conflicting URLs for package `werkzeug`:
- git+https://github.com/pallets/werkzeug.git@2.0.0
- https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/ff/1d/960bb4017c68674a1cb099534840f18d3def3ce44aed12b5ed8b78e0153e/Werkzeug-2.0.0-py3-none-any.whl
```

### Conflicting transitive URL dependency

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::conflicting_transitive_url_dependency -->

A URL dependency that conflicts with a transitive dependency fails.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
flask==3.0.0
werkzeug @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/ff/1d/960bb4017c68674a1cb099534840f18d3def3ce44aed12b5ed8b78e0153e/Werkzeug-2.0.0-py3-none-any.whl
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in
success: false
exit_code: 1
----- stdout -----

----- stderr -----
  × No solution found when resolving dependencies:
  ╰─▶ Because only werkzeug<3.0.0 is available and flask==3.0.0 depends on werkzeug>=3.0.0, we can conclude that flask==3.0.0 cannot be used.
      And because you require flask==3.0.0, we can conclude that your requirements are unsatisfiable.
```

## URL preservation

### Preserve URL case

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::preserve_url -->

URLs are preserved in their original case.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
flask @ https://files.PYTHONHOSTED.org/packages/36/42/015c23096649b908c809c69388a805a571a3bea44362fe87e33fc3afa01f/flask-3.0.0-py3-none-any.whl
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in
blinker==1.7.0
    # via flask
click==8.1.7
    # via flask
flask @ https://files.PYTHONHOSTED.org/packages/36/42/015c23096649b908c809c69388a805a571a3bea44362fe87e33fc3afa01f/flask-3.0.0-py3-none-any.whl
    # via -r requirements.in
itsdangerous==2.1.2
    # via flask
jinja2==3.1.3
    # via flask
markupsafe==2.1.5
    # via
    #   jinja2
    #   werkzeug
werkzeug==3.0.1
    # via flask

----- stderr -----
Resolved 7 packages in [TIME]
```

## Legacy sdist URLs

### PEP 517 legacy sdist

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_legacy_sdist_pep_517 -->

Resolve a project from a legacy source distribution (without pyproject.toml) using PEP 517.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
flake8 @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/66/53/3ad4a3b74d609b3b9008a10075c40e7c8909eae60af53623c3888f7a529a/flake8-6.0.0.tar.gz
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in
flake8 @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/66/53/3ad4a3b74d609b3b9008a10075c40e7c8909eae60af53623c3888f7a529a/flake8-6.0.0.tar.gz
    # via -r requirements.in
mccabe==0.7.0
    # via flake8
pycodestyle==2.10.0
    # via flake8
pyflakes==3.0.1
    # via flake8

----- stderr -----
Resolved 4 packages in [TIME]
```

### Legacy sdist with requires.txt

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::compile_requires_txt -->

Resolve a project from an older Flask sdist (1.0.4) with egg-info style metadata (requires.txt).

```toml
# file: requirements.in
flask @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/36/70/2234ee8842148cef44261c2cebca3a6384894bce6112b73b18693cdcc62f/Flask-1.0.4.tar.gz
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in
click==8.1.7
    # via flask
flask @ https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/36/70/2234ee8842148cef44261c2cebca3a6384894bce6112b73b18693cdcc62f/Flask-1.0.4.tar.gz
    # via -r requirements.in
itsdangerous==2.1.2
    # via flask
jinja2==3.1.3
    # via flask
markupsafe==2.1.5
    # via
    #   jinja2
    #   werkzeug
werkzeug==3.0.1
    # via flask

----- stderr -----
Resolved 6 packages in [TIME]
```

## Unnamed URL dependencies

### Unnamed HTTPS requirement

<!-- from pip_compile.rs::unnamed_https_requirement -->

Given an URL where the filename doesn't reveal the package name (e.g., `3.0.2.tar.gz`), the package
name is determined by downloading and inspecting the metadata.

```toml
# file: requirements.in
https://github.com/pallets/flask/archive/refs/tags/3.0.2.tar.gz
```

```console
$ uv pip compile requirements.in
success: true
exit_code: 0
----- stdout -----
# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv --cache-dir [CACHE_DIR] pip compile requirements.in
blinker==1.7.0
    # via flask
click==8.1.7
    # via flask
flask @ https://github.com/pallets/flask/archive/refs/tags/3.0.2.tar.gz
    # via -r requirements.in
itsdangerous==2.1.2
    # via flask
jinja2==3.1.3
    # via flask
markupsafe==2.1.5
    # via
    #   jinja2
    #   werkzeug
werkzeug==3.0.1
    # via flask

----- stderr -----
Resolved 7 packages in [TIME]
```
